name: Chutes

dataResidency.euRegionDetails: Chutes describes its infrastructure as a decentralized or global GPU/miner network with auto-routing to geographically optimal nodes, and does not publish an EU-only processing option in the consulted primary sources.

dataUsage.retentionPolicy: Chutes states it does not log, store, or persist the content of API requests or responses.
dataUsage.details: The privacy policy says API request and response content is not logged, stored, or persisted, and describes TEE hardware and end-to-end encryption protections. No primary-source statement was found in the consulted materials confirming whether customer/API data is used for model training.

notes: Chutes publishes a privacy policy stating it does not log, store, or persist API request/response content, and its current architecture materials emphasize TEEs and end-to-end encrypted inference. However, the consulted primary sources did not provide a public DPA, sub-processor list, SCC statement, headquarters country, or EU-only data residency commitment; the provider also describes a global decentralized GPU/miner network, so inference can leave the EU.
